violations.text: Establishment does not sanitize equipment after washing and rinsing them. Equipment must be sanitized. Inspector demonstrated how to make a bleach water solution during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2024

Muffins packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. The person in charge placed the label information with the muffins during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2024

Hot water was not available in the bathroom handwashing sink. Hot water knob would not turn on. Hot water must be repaired. Please email inspector proof of repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2024

There was no evidence that employees are required to report to the person in charge information about their health (illnesses, symptoms) as they relate to diseases that are transmissible through food. An employee illness policy was given to the person in charge at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2023

The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Written procedures were given to the person in charge at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2023

Thermometers are lacking in the refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2023

The door to the outside, located in the beverage cooler area, is not tight-fitting (screen door is broken). Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2023
